rationale: Ground truth has no substantive reviewer concerns (bot credit-limit messages and a 'thanks' comment), so both candidates trivially achieve full recall. Both reviews are well-grounded in the diff, correctly validate the >=10→==10 fix and the rename/test coverage, and independently raise the same sm_110a/cc-11.x edge case (likely from the fuller PR description), suggesting neither fabricated it. Y edges ahead on actionability with two concrete, file:line nits including a specific missing test parametrization ((10,1) for sm_101) plus an explicit consumer-safety sweep (quack_enabled/install_quack_fp8_patch callers), while X's single nit is hedged as optional/omittable.
